llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:

   - 'Vegan Bistro' - In the ground-truth ratings under restaurants, Vegan Bistro has a rating of 8.

   - 'Jazz Club Experience' - In the ground-truth ratings under night_activities, Jazz Club has a rating of 8.
   - 'Night Market Visit' - In the ground-truth ratings under night_activities, Night Market Visit has a rating of 8.

All items in the final package can be mapped to their corresponding ratings in the ground-truth data.
